expectations.text: Detected missing aria-expanded on hamburger menu button
expectations.evidence: Item 33 in report identifies: '햄버거 버튼 클릭 시 aria-expanded 상태 미변경(Playwright 확인: 클릭 전후 모두 null)' with fix recommendation to add aria-expanded={menuOpen}.

expectations.text: Detected missing aria-pressed on filter toggle buttons
expectations.evidence: Item 33 in report identifies: '필터 버튼 클릭 시 aria-pressed 상태 미변경(Playwright 확인: 클릭 후에도 null)' with fix recommendation to add aria-pressed={filter === f.value}.

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence: HTML report contains a dedicated '시맨틱 HTML 검토' (Semantic HTML Review) section with 7 sub-items (랜드마크 요소, 섹션 구조, 대화형 요소, 목록 구조, 표현용 태그, 폼 그룹, 기타 시맨틱 요소). CSV also includes rows prefixed 시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-7.

Report uses the standard 5-level classification: ✅ (pass), ⚠️ (warning/partial), ❌ (fail), ➖ (N/A), 🔵 판정불가 (undetermined). Summary table groups by principles with pass/warning/fail/NA/undetermined counts.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Every ❌ item (11, 17, 29, 33) and every ⚠️ item (6, 12, 14, 18, 23, plus semantic items) has a '수정 가이드' column with specific code-level fix recommendations. The HTML report also has a detailed '수정 필요 항목' section with expanded fix guidance.

expectations.text: Browser-target items (A-33 aria-expanded/aria-pressed) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: Item 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성 준수) shows 'Playwright' as the verdict method in both CSV ('Playwright' column) and HTML ('Playwright'). Evidence text confirms 'Playwright 확인' was used for runtime verification.
